title: CT11 automation-first Lean tactic
description: The complete compiled graph, general capability API, specialized capability profiles, node automation contracts, and semantic residual inventory for this tactic.

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {capability : CT11.Capability P} (self : CT11.Input capability),
  (List.map (capability.localBudget self.context) self.cells.values).sum < 0
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Input.deficit

internalDeclarations.type: Core.Problem → Type (max uAmbient uBranch)
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.BranchContext
internalDeclarations.docString:
The inherited state of one branch, shared by dependent CT inputs and route
triggers.

internalDeclarations.type: Type (max (uAmbient + 1) (uBranch + 1))
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.Problem
internalDeclarations.docString:
Mathematical data shared by every tactic in one structural-exhaustion
proof instance.

internalDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT11.Capability P → Type uCell
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Capability.Cell

internalDeclarations.type: Type u → Type u
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.OrderedCollection
internalDeclarations.docString:
A finite ordered collection, without the claim that it contains every
inhabitant of its element type.

This is intentionally a duplicate-free list rather than a `Finset`: first-hit
machine semantics consume its order.  All set-like reasoning should pass
through Mathlib's `List`/`Finset` API instead of adding another collection
implementation here.

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → Core.OrderedCollection α → List α
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.OrderedCollection.values

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT11.Capability P} →
    (context : Core.BranchContext P) →
      (cells : Core.OrderedCollection capability.Cell) →
        (List.map (capability.localBudget context) cells.values).sum < 0 → CT11.Input capability
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Input.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT11.Capability P) → CT11.Input capability → CT11.Graph.NodeId → CT11.Graph.NodeId → Type uCell
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Graph.Edge

internalDeclarations.type: CT11.Graph.NodeId
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Graph.NodeId.admissibility

internalDeclarations.type: CT11.Graph.NodeId
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Graph.NodeId.decomposition

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → List α → (α → Prop) → Type u
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult
internalDeclarations.docString: Search evidence relative to an arbitrary finite list.

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {xs : List α} → {p : α → Prop} → (∀ value ∈ xs, ¬p value) → Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {xs : List α} → {p : α → Prop} → (value : α) → value ∈ xs → p value → Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.found

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (xs : List α) (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)) (value : α),
  List.find? (fun value => decide (p value)) xs = some value → decide (p value) = true
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList._proof_1

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)) (value : α),
  decide (p value) = true → p value
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList._proof_2

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (xs : List α) (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)),
  List.find? (fun value => decide (p value)) xs = none → ∀ value ∈ xs, p value → False
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList._proof_3

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u_1} →
  (motive : Option α → Sort u_2) →
    (x : Option α) → ((value : α) → x = some value → motive (some value)) → (x = none → motive none) → motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList.match_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT11.Capability P} →
    {input : CT11.Input capability} →
      CT11.AdmissibleDecomposition capability input → CT11.AdmissibilityDecision capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.AdmissibilityDecision.closed

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT11.Capability P} →
    {input : CT11.Input capability} →
      CT11.AdmissibilityGapResidual capability input → CT11.AdmissibilityDecision capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.AdmissibilityDecision.gap

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT11.Capability P} →
    {input : CT11.Input capability} →
      (cell : capability.Cell) →
        cell ∈ input.cells.values →
          ¬capability.Admissible input.context cell → CT11.AdmissibilityGapResidual capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.AdmissibilityGapResidual.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {capability : CT11.Capability P} {input : CT11.Input capability},
  (∀ cell ∈ input.cells.values, capability.Admissible input.context cell) →
    CT11.AdmissibleDecomposition capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.AdmissibleDecomposition.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT11.Capability P} →
    {input : CT11.Input capability} →
      CT11.AdmissibleDecomposition capability input →
        (cell : capability.Cell) →
          cell ∈ input.cells.values →
            capability.localBudget input.context cell < 0 → CT11.LocalizedDeficitResidual capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.LocalizedDeficitResidual.mk

internalDeclarations.type: CT11.Graph.NodeId
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Graph.NodeId.gapTerminal

internalDeclarations.type:

        {a a_1 : CT11.Graph.NodeId} →
          (t : CT11.Graph.Path capability input a a_1) →
            ((a a_2 : CT11.Graph.NodeId) →
                (t : CT11.Graph.Path capability input a a_2) → CT11.Graph.Path.below t → motive a a_2 t) →
              motive a a_1 t

        CT11.Graph.Edge capability input a b →
          CT11.Graph.Path capability input b c → CT11.Graph.Path capability input a c

{P : Core.Problem} →

{P : Core.Problem} →

internalDeclarations.type:

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →

        (x : CT11.AdmissibilityDecision capability input) →
          ((residual : CT11.AdmissibilityGapResidual capability input) →
              motive (CT11.AdmissibilityDecision.gap residual)) →
            ((admissible : CT11.AdmissibleDecomposition capability input) →
                motive (CT11.AdmissibilityDecision.closed admissible)) →
              motive x

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT11.Capability P} →

        {a a_1 : CT11.Graph.NodeId} → CT11.Graph.Path capability input a a_1 → Sort (max (uCell + 1) u)
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Graph.Path.below

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT11.Capability P} →
    {input : CT11.Input capability} →
      {motive : (a a_1 : CT11.Graph.NodeId) → CT11.Graph.Path capability input a a_1 → Sort u} →
        {a a_1 : CT11.Graph.NodeId} →
          (t : CT11.Graph.Path capability input a a_1) →
            ((a a_2 : CT11.Graph.NodeId) →
                (t : CT11.Graph.Path capability input a a_2) → CT11.Graph.Path.below t → motive a a_2 t) →
              motive a a_1 t ×' CT11.Graph.Path.below t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Graph.Path.brecOn.go

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT11.Capability P) →
    (input : CT11.Input capability) →
      {a b : CT11.Graph.NodeId} → CT11.Graph.Edge capability input a b → CT11.Graph.NodeId
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Graph.Edge.source

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT11.Capability P) →
    (input : CT11.Input capability) →
      (motive : (b a : CT11.Graph.NodeId) → CT11.Graph.Path capability input a b → Sort u_4) →
        (b a : CT11.Graph.NodeId) →
          (x : CT11.Graph.Path capability input a b) →
            ((n : CT11.Graph.NodeId) → motive n n (CT11.Graph.Path.nil n)) →
              ((b a b_1 : CT11.Graph.NodeId) →
                  (e : CT11.Graph.Edge capability input a b_1) →
                    (p : CT11.Graph.Path capability input b_1 b) → motive b a (CT11.Graph.Path.cons e p)) →
                motive b a x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Graph.Path.trace.match_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{motive : CT11.Graph.Terminal → Sort u} →
  (t : CT11.Graph.Terminal) → motive CT11.Graph.Terminal.gap → motive CT11.Graph.Terminal.localized → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Graph.Terminal.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT11.Capability P) (input : CT11.Input capability),
  (∀ value ∈ input.cells.values, ¬¬capability.Admissible input.context value) →
    CT11.AdmissibleDecomposition capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.analyzeAdmissibility._proof_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT11.Capability P) →
    (input : CT11.Input capability) →
      (motive :
          (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult input.cells.values fun cell => ¬capability.Admissible input.context cell) →
            Sort u_4) →
        (x : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult input.cells.values fun cell => ¬capability.Admissible input.context cell) →
          ((cell : capability.Cell) →
              (member : cell ∈ input.cells.values) →
                (inadmissible : ¬capability.Admissible input.context cell) →
                  motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.found cell member inadmissible)) →
            ((noGap : ∀ value ∈ input.cells.values, ¬¬capability.Admissible input.context value) →
                motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent noGap)) →
              motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.analyzeAdmissibility.match_3

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT11.Capability P) →
    (input : CT11.Input capability) → (cell : capability.Cell) → Decidable ¬capability.Admissible input.context cell
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.inadmissibleDecidable

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT11.Capability P) (input : CT11.Input capability),
  (∀ value ∈ input.cells.values, ¬capability.localBudget input.context value < 0) →
    0 ≤ (List.map (capability.localBudget input.context) input.cells.values).sum
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.localize._proof_1

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT11.Capability P) (input : CT11.Input capability),
  0 ≤ (List.map (capability.localBudget input.context) input.cells.values).sum → False
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.localize._proof_2

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT11.Capability P) →
    (input : CT11.Input capability) →
      (motive :
          (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult input.cells.values fun cell => capability.localBudget input.context cell < 0) →
            Sort u_4) →
        (x :
            Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult input.cells.values fun cell => capability.localBudget input.context cell < 0) →
          ((cell : capability.Cell) →
              (member : cell ∈ input.cells.values) →
                (negative : capability.localBudget input.context cell < 0) →
                  motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.found cell member negative)) →
            ((noNegative : ∀ value ∈ input.cells.values, ¬capability.localBudget input.context value < 0) →
                motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent noNegative)) →
              motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.localize.match_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT11.Capability P} →
    {input : CT11.Input capability} →
      {motive : CT11.AdmissibilityDecision capability input → Sort u} →
        (t : CT11.AdmissibilityDecision capability input) →
          ((residual : CT11.AdmissibilityGapResidual capability input) →
              motive (CT11.AdmissibilityDecision.gap residual)) →
            ((state : CT11.AdmissibleDecomposition capability input) →
                motive (CT11.AdmissibilityDecision.closed state)) →
              motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.AdmissibilityDecision.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT11.Capability P} →
    {input : CT11.Input capability} →
      {motive : (a a_1 : CT11.Graph.NodeId) → CT11.Graph.Path capability input a a_1 → Sort u} →
        ((n : CT11.Graph.NodeId) → motive n n (CT11.Graph.Path.nil n)) →
          ({a b c : CT11.Graph.NodeId} →
              (a_1 : CT11.Graph.Edge capability input a b) →
                (a_2 : CT11.Graph.Path capability input b c) →
                  motive b c a_2 → motive a c (CT11.Graph.Path.cons a_1 a_2)) →
            {a a_1 : CT11.Graph.NodeId} → (t : CT11.Graph.Path capability input a a_1) → motive a a_1 t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Graph.Path.rec

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT11.Capability P} →
    {input : CT11.Input capability} →
      {motive : (a a_1 : CT11.Graph.NodeId) → CT11.Graph.Path capability input a a_1 → Sort u} →
        {a a_1 : CT11.Graph.NodeId} →
          (t : CT11.Graph.Path capability input a a_1) →
            ((n : CT11.Graph.NodeId) → motive n n (CT11.Graph.Path.nil n)) →
              ({a b c : CT11.Graph.NodeId} →
                  (a_2 : CT11.Graph.Edge capability input a b) →
                    (a_3 : CT11.Graph.Path capability input b c) → motive a c (CT11.Graph.Path.cons a_2 a_3)) →
                motive a a_1 t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Graph.Path.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type:
{motive : CT11.Graph.Terminal → Sort u} →
  motive CT11.Graph.Terminal.gap → motive CT11.Graph.Terminal.localized → (t : CT11.Graph.Terminal) → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.Graph.Terminal.rec

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT11.Capability P) (input : CT11.Input capability) (cell : capability.Cell)
  (motive : Decidable (capability.Admissible input.context cell) → Prop)
  (x : Decidable (capability.Admissible input.context cell)),
  (∀ (admissible : capability.Admissible input.context cell), motive (isTrue admissible)) →
    (∀ (inadmissible : ¬capability.Admissible input.context cell), motive (isFalse inadmissible)) → motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.analyzeAdmissibility.match_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u} →
  {xs : List α} →
    {p : α → Prop} →
      {motive : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p → Sort u_1} →
        (t : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p) →
          ((value : α) →
              (member : value ∈ xs) →
                (holds : p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.found value member holds)) →
            ((none : ∀ value ∈ xs, ¬p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent none)) → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT11.Capability P) →
    (input : CT11.Input capability) →
      (cell : capability.Cell) →
        (motive : Decidable (capability.Admissible input.context cell) → Sort u_4) →
          (x : Decidable (capability.Admissible input.context cell)) →
            ((admissible : capability.Admissible input.context cell) → motive (isTrue admissible)) →
              ((inadmissible : ¬capability.Admissible input.context cell) → motive (isFalse inadmissible)) → motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.inadmissibleDecidable.match_1

internalDeclarations.type: ∀ {α : Type u_1} {β : Type u_2} {b : β} {f : α → β} {l : List α}, (b ∈ List.map f l) = ∃ a ∈ l, f a = b
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.localize._simp_3

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT11.Capability P} →
    {input : CT11.Input capability} →
      {motive : CT11.AdmissibilityDecision capability input → Sort u} →
        ((residual : CT11.AdmissibilityGapResidual capability input) →
            motive (CT11.AdmissibilityDecision.gap residual)) →
          ((state : CT11.AdmissibleDecomposition capability input) → motive (CT11.AdmissibilityDecision.closed state)) →
            (t : CT11.AdmissibilityDecision capability input) → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT11.AdmissibilityDecision.rec

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u} →
  {xs : List α} →
    {p : α → Prop} →
      {motive : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p → Sort u_1} →
        ((value : α) →
            (member : value ∈ xs) →
              (holds : p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.found value member holds)) →
          ((none : ∀ value ∈ xs, ¬p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent none)) →
            (t : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p) → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.rec
